modeling.title: 3D modelling and drawings
modeling.description: Solid models, assemblies, and drawings with tolerances and a review discipline you can take to the shop floor or a technical gate.

dfm.title: Design for manufacture
dfm.description: Material selection, tooling logic, and process fit so the part is not only right on paper—it can actually be built.

analysis.title: Analysis and validation
analysis.description: Hand calculations and CAE where it matters: stiffness, factors of safety, and assumptions you can defend.

prototypes.title: Prototypes and iteration
prototypes.description: Drawings, bench tests, and fast learning loops that connect geometry with how the hardware feels in your hands.
